ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the airline */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the airport */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the airports table */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the airports table */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the departure and arrival airports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the airlines table */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the routes table */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "scheduled_departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "scheduled_arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the flights table */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delays_and_cancellations" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay or cancellation */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the flights table */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay or cancellation */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the delay or cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_scheduling" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the flights table */,
  "crew_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "duty_time" REAL /* Duty time of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_planning" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the flights table */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocation" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the flights table */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource */,
  "allocation_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)
